tree.name: Gabe Vincent
tree.tradeDescription: Hawks traded Luke Kennard to Lakers for Gabe Vincent and a 2032 2nd-round pick (LAL own).
tree.note: 2023 NBA Finals starter with Miami, playoff-tested guard.

assetsGivenUp.name: Luke Kennard
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent from Memphis. Elite 3-point shooter, career 44% from deep. Sent to LAL in Vincent trade.
